person.name: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch

zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch於1260年之前與Madog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Goch在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch于1260年之前与Madog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Goch在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .
English: variant of   Pape   1.

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: vychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .
English: variant of   Pape   1.

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Goch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Pawel, Zuzanna, Zygmunt.
North German: habitational name from any of various minor places which get their names from an ancient Germanic element goch, gog ‘marsh, bog, fen’.
Polish: from a pet form of various personal names beginning with Go-, such as Gościsław.

variants.name: Gotch
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’; see Gooch 3.
English (Northamptonshire): variant of   Gooch   1 and 2.
Americanized form of German Götsch (see Gotsch ).

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch married Madog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Goch before 1260, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch a épousé Madog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Goch avant 1260, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch hat vor 1260 in Wales Madog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Goch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch lei sposato Madog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Goch prima del 1260, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Gochは1260年以前にウェールズでMadog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Gochと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch(은)는 1260년 이전 웨일스에서 Madog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Goch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch casou-se com Madog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Goch antes 1260, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch вышла замуж за человека по имени Madog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Goch перед 1260 г. в местности Уэльс. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Madog ap Llowarch vychan ap Llowarch Goch se casó con Madog ap Llowarch Vychan ap Llowarch Goch antes de 1260, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
